failedAssertions.reason: Real-time cross-session update did not occur without refresh.
Second save overwrote the first tab's title update instead of preserving both field changes.
Cmd+K does not open a command palette; only focuses the toolbar search input (dialogs count observed as 0).
Command-palette result list/selection behavior is absent.
Cross-view Cmd+Z worked, but Cmd+K did not open command palette in any view (focuses toolbar search instead).
Shift+Click range selection could not be reproduced in either HierarchyView or SpreadsheetView; only single-item selection occurred.
Marquee drag did not result in card selection on release.
Cmd+A did not trigger select-all behavior in tested views; expected full multi-select state was not observed.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Feature surface required by assertion is not present in current build, so end-to-end validation cannot be executed.

Blocked: manager reassignment drag could not be triggered through agent-browser interactions (mouse, selector drag, or hierarchy keyboard drag), so undo behavior for reassignment could not be validated.

appliedUpdates.description: Added AG Grid row-selection and multi-tab isolation guidance discovered during core-ux flow validation.
